_meta.description: Major risks declared by user, first-class monitored on Overview. The bot monitors signal indicators daily and flags transitions.

risks.name: Tech overheat / AI capex
scenarios: Multiple de-rating without fundamental break (summer 2024 style): -25 to -35% on premium names, fundamentals intact
Hyperscaler capex pause (META/MSFT/GOOGL/AMZN slowdown 2026-2027): entire pass-through chain (ASML/TSM/4063/BESI/KLAC/6857/7011/SU/AVGO/ALAB) re-prices together, -35 to -45% factor
Deeper AI thesis break (ROI disappoints end customers): -50%+ scenario on factor

surveillance_signals.label: Hyperscaler capex guidance (next earnings)
surveillance_signals.trigger: Bearish revision of 2026 capex / cautious commentary

surveillance_signals.label: TSM monthly revenue + utilization N3/N2
surveillance_signals.trigger: 2 consecutive months decline or cautious guidance

surveillance_signals.label: HBM pricing (SK Hynix / Micron commentary)
surveillance_signals.trigger: Pricing power cracks despite Blackwell ramp support

surveillance_signals.label: Wafer pricing (4063.T Shin-Etsu commentary)
surveillance_signals.trigger: Pricing softening while demand should support = early signal pass-through chain breaks from below

surveillance_signals.label: Insider selling cluster (smart money out)
surveillance_signals.trigger: Net insider sells > $50M over 30d without compensating buys on 2+ strategic tickers
surveillance_signals.last_eval_reason: Insider selling cluster > $50M/30d on 4 strategic tickers: AVGO (-$356M), AMD (-$117M), MU (-$54M), AMZN (-$52M). Concrete smart money out.

surveillance_signals.label: Order books running out of steam
surveillance_signals.trigger: Order intake/bookings decline, lead times shrinking, soft demand commentary at fabless/foundry/equipment

surveillance_signals.label: Inventory buildup at customers (channel destocking)
surveillance_signals.trigger: Days inventory rising at hyperscalers/distributors, channel stuffing warnings, destocking risk

surveillance_signals.label: Bearish earnings revisions (Sell-side estimates)
surveillance_signals.trigger: Consensus estimates revised downward 2 consecutive times on Compute AI tickers

mitigation_plan.label: A. Continue pruning memory overlaps
mitigation_plan.action: Exit SK Hynix (~1500-2000€) toward strict ballast. MU stays memory anchor.

mitigation_plan.label: B. Strengthen strict ballast
mitigation_plan.action: Bump SAF.PA (priority PEA reinforcement), MP (magnets ramp to execute), HO.PA, CCJ pure uranium
mitigation_plan.notes: CCJ bump +1000€ done on 05-29, SAF still under-sized (606€)

mitigation_plan.label: C. Trim on valos > bull case (if signal #1 triggered)
mitigation_plan.action: Priority exits: AMD (P/E ~92x), ALAB (valo>bull+fade), TSLA (valo>bull). To free defensive cash quickly.
mitigation_plan.notes: Activate ONLY if bearish capex revision signal

target.note: Do not reduce deliberate concentration, but maximize decorrelated ballast within accepted budget.

user_arbitrage_history.decision: cluster_cap_target 75 -> 70 to tolerate -21% drawdown instead of -23%
user_arbitrage_history.rationale: explicit validation: tolerates -16k€ on 70k target (-11k€ today) with discipline
